## Feature idea

Describe the improvement or new skill.

## Problem it solves

What repeated AI coding workflow would this improve?

## Proposed files

Example:

```text
skills/new-skill-name/SKILL.md
```

## Project-safety considerations

Explain how this feature avoids overriding project-specific harnessing.

## Additional context

Add examples, references, or expected behavior.
